title: Rena's Spiders x Fresh Animations
description: Fresh Animations compatible version of Rena's Spiders!
body:
![Rena's Spiders Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/034a3d14f6354760125e66c914902f71ea218ee2.png)

# What is this pack?
A port of my Spiders pack to allow it to work with Fresh Animations!

Original link to main pack:
[Rena's Spiders - Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/renas-spiders)

(Im working on updating this page, it'll take time since I'm working on my new visual style)

## CREDITS

- **Fresh__LX:** Creator of Fresh Animations
- **traben_0:** Helping me understand moving the cave spider's root position!
